iterations.ai_content: The analysis found 51,271 parcels in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas. The first 10 parcels sorted by teigid ascending range from teigid 166069157 to 166069788. All intersect the quick-clay hazard area "Trondheim 1621-4" with kartleggingstatus "8". These parcels are all located in Trondheim municipality (kommunenummer 5001).

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'
